Formerly: ISRL329C .

ISRL381 Israeli Foreign and Security Policy (3 Credits)

An overview of Israeli foreign and security policy from 1948 to the present. We will examine how Israel's foreign and security policies reflect its Jewish origins, Zionist ideology, its relations with its neighbors and world powers, and its regional quest for recognition and legitimacy. Credit Only Granted for: ISRL381, ISRL329P or GVPT368E.
